title: Floating / Gliding
meaning: In the realm of dreams, floating or gliding signifies a transcendence beyond the mundane constraints of the earthly realm. Such dreams often symbolize a liberation of the spirit, an elevation above worldly concerns, and a deep connection with one's inner self. It is a manifestation of the dreamer's subconscious desire to rise above life's challenges and embrace a state of serene detachment.

interpretations.psychological: Psychologically, floating or gliding in dreams may indicate a sense of freedom and release from psychological burdens. It reflects the dreamer's ability to navigate through life's challenges with ease, suggesting a harmonious balance between the conscious and unconscious mind.
interpretations.spiritual: Spiritually, this symbol represents an ascension to higher planes of consciousness, where the soul is unburdened by the material world. It is a call to connect with one's higher self and embrace the divine energies flowing through the universe.
interpretations.messengers: The message carried by dreams of floating or gliding is one of encouragement to rise above current obstacles and trust in the innate wisdom of the self. It is a reminder to let go of fear and embrace the fluidity of existence, allowing oneself to soar towards one's true potential.

scenarios.title: Floating Over a Serene Landscape
scenarios.description: In this scenario, the dreamer finds themselves floating effortlessly over a tranquil landscape, such as a lush green valley or a calm ocean. This symbolizes a period of peace and self-reflection, urging the dreamer to appreciate the beauty of their inner world and the harmony that is possible when one is in tune with oneself.

scenarios.title: Gliding Through the Night Sky
scenarios.description: Here, the dreamer glides through a starlit sky, surrounded by the vastness of the universe. This scenario suggests a journey into the unknown aspects of the dreamer's psyche, encouraging an exploration of deep-seated desires and the mysteries that lie within.
